LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_FMJ.label: 13x40mm Presidential (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_FMJ.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the most powerful handgun cartridges ever designed. It is reserved for the heavy-framed Senator revolver.
LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_AP.label: 13x40mm Presidential (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_AP.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the most powerful handgun cartridges ever designed. It is reserved for the heavy-framed Senator revolver.
LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_HP.label: 13x40mm Presidential (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_13x40Prez_HP.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the most powerful handgun cartridges ever designed. It is reserved for the heavy-framed Senator revolver.
LanguageData.Bullet_13x40Prez_FMJ.label: .500 Smith Wessen Magnum bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_13x40Prez_AP.label: .500 Smith Wessen Magnum bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_13x40Prez_HP.label: .500 Smith Wessen Magnum bullet (HP)
